hero_title: Welcome to La Cupa – Ethical Brunch
hero_text: Enjoy sustainable brunch with regional organic ingredients in a stylish atmosphere!
dish1_desc: Organic sourdough bread, avocado, radish, poached egg.
dish2_desc: Spelt pancakes, fresh berries, maple syrup.
dish3_desc: Homemade granola, coconut yogurt, seasonal fruits.
about_text: La Cupa stands for mindful enjoyment: We work with regional partners, prefer organic products and rely on short supply chains.
